name: Mr. X breeds you [Leon Kennedy Edition]
description:
As you cautiously approach the source of the commotion, the sounds of what you thought were grunts of exertion grow louder, stirring a blend of curiosity and dread within you. With a deep breath to steady your nerves, you gently push the door open, revealing a scene of primal lust and domination playing out before you. There, Leon Kennedy is pinned beneath the overwhelming force of Mr. X's insatiable desire, bent over a desk and being thoroughly fucked.

[Art Credit: Emberstock]

[So this is more than a little late. I promised this at 1k for the [Claire Redfield Edition] and...clearly that didn't happen so guess what? You're not just getting one Leon bot but TWO! Stay tuned!]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨
(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!
